title: Apple Releases New AI Chip
full_text: Apple announced a revolutionary new artificial intelligence chip today. It promises to make machine learning models run twice as fast on local devices.

title: Stock Market Hits Record Highs
full_text: Global stock markets surged today as inflation fears eased. Tech stocks led the rally, with major gains across the board.

title: New Election Laws Debated
full_text: Lawmakers are in a heated debate over the proposed election security bill. The changes would require new identification standards.

title: AI in Healthcare Saves Lives
full_text: Hospitals are using artificial intelligence to detect diseases earlier. The new algorithms scan X-rays with incredible accuracy.
